where Gojo is teaching you how to play pool.

requested bot!

i had some issues with the google forms so i wasn't able to see all the requests 😭 i only recently realised i could turn it into a spreadsheet, so now i can finally mark which requests i've done and which i havent.

will try and get some more requested bots done this week. i have a lot in my drafts just still not happy with how they are (i.e., that meet me in the pale moonlight bot... im gonna rewrite it)

enjoy! 🫶🏼
